name: Neon Knights
short_description: Neon Knights is an action-packed, neon-drenched brawler that’s all about local & online multiplayer madness.
detailed_description:
Drop into the wildest Brawler arena where you and your squad can flex those trigger fingers! Neon Knights is an action-packed, neon-drenched shooter that’s all about local & online multiplayer madness. 

What’s your Knight?  

Arrow – Snipe ‘em with precision!   

Machine – Spray and pray!  

Blade – Use that cutting edge technology!  

Wall – Tank it like a boss!  

Arcane – Make it rain! (with bullets, I mean)

Face off against your friends or a horde of bots in dynamic Neon Arenas. Every time you burn out, you respawn harder, faster, stronger, brighter! Stack glorious powerups ‘til you’re a glowing juggernaut. Last Knight standing? That’s the goal!

  

Solo queue? Squad up? Local couch co-op or online brawls? Neon Knights supports it all - play with your friends locally, play with some here and some there, play all online. We made this game as an homage to the best of days gone by - playing with your friends any way you’d like.

It’s time to light up that scoreboard, bury your rivals, and rule the Neon void tonight!!

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Russian*, Spanish - Latin America*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
